Jan Asselijn

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Threatened Swan
by Jan Asselijn
Dutch Golden Age · c. 1650
A swan explodes into defense against a dog stalking its nest — wings spread, neck arched, white feathers flying. Later reinterpreted as a political allegory for the Republic defending itself.
←Iran or Central Asia Mesopotamian, Assyrian→
